message:
feat(crates): ASUPERSYNC test macro migration across 8 crates

Complete the tokio→fcp-async-core test macro migration for the remaining
crates that still used #[tokio::test] directly. This ensures all test
suites run through the unified fcp-async-core runtime abstraction layer,
which is prerequisite for the deterministic replay and cancellation
features in the ASUPERSYNC program.

Crate-by-crate changes:

- fcp-async-core: migrate internal tests to self-hosted
  #[fcp_async_core::runtime::test] macro, export yield_now for
  cooperative scheduling in tests
- fcp-mesh: migrate 12+ integration tests from tokio::test
- fcp-tailscale: migrate 7 client tests from tokio::test
- fcp-e2e: migrate 9 end-to-end framework tests from tokio::test
- fcp-core: migrate lifecycle_canary_e2e from tokio::test
- fcp-conformance: rustfmt formatting normalization on harness tests
  + Cargo.toml dependency alignment
- fcp-graphql: client test migration + expanded assertions
- fcp-testkit: minor migration adjustments across assertions,
  mock_server, supervisor_examples, and tracing_config modules

All Cargo.toml files updated with fcp-async-core dev-dependency
where not already present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1665,6 +1665,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "chrono",
  "ciborium",
  "ed25519-dalek",
+ "fcp-async-core",
  "fcp-core",
  "fcp-crypto",
  "hex",
@@ -1751,6 +1752,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "chrono",
  "ciborium",
  "clap",
+ "fcp-async-core",
  "fcp-cbor",
  "fcp-core",
  "fcp-crypto",
@@ -1783,6 +1785,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "chrono",
  "ciborium",
  "ed25519-dalek",
+ "fcp-async-core",
  "fcp-cbor",
  "fcp-crypto",
  "fcp-testkit",
@@ -1861,6 +1864,7 @@ name = "fcp-e2e"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "chrono",
+ "fcp-async-core",
  "fcp-conformance",
  "fcp-core",
  "fcp-manifest",
@@ -1947,6 +1951,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "ciborium",
  "constant_time_eq",
  "criterion",
+ "fcp-async-core",
  "fcp-cbor",
  "fcp-core",
  "fcp-crypto",
@@ -2217,6 +2222,7 @@ version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "base64 0.22.1",
  "chrono",
+ "fcp-async-core",
  "fcp-cbor",
  "fcp-core",
  "fcp-crypto",

@@ -32,13 +32,13 @@ serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
 sha2 = "0.10"
 thiserror.workspace = true
-tokio.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 zeroize.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 ciborium.workspace = true
 criterion.workspace = true
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../fcp-async-core" }
 fcp-cbor = { path = "../fcp-cbor" }
 fcp-testkit = { path = "../fcp-testkit" }

@@ -247,7 +247,7 @@ pub async fn assert_completes_within<F, T>(future: F, timeout: std::time::Durati
 where
     F: std::future::Future<Output = T>,
 {
-    tokio::time::timeout(timeout, future)
+    fcp_async_core::time::timeout(timeout, future)
         .await
         .expect("Operation timed out")
 }
